# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Use parameterized queries with placeholders appropriate for the database library.
- Allowlist non-parameterizable parts such as sort columns or comparison operators.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not build SQL using string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting with untrusted input.
- Do not trust stored values if they can later be reused in dynamic SQL.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response, Router } from "express";
import { getRepository } from "typeorm";
import {
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  CreateDateColumn,
  UpdateDateColumn,
} from "typeorm";

// ─── Entity ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@Entity("products")
export class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 255 })
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: "text", nullable: true })
  description!: string;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price!: number;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100 })
  category!: string;

  @Column({ type: "varchar", length: 100 })
  brand!: string;

  @Column({ type: "int", default: 0 })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ type: "decimal", precision: 3, scale: 2, default: 0 })
  rating!: number;

  @Column({ type: "boolean", default: true })
  is_active!: boolean;

  @CreateDateColumn()
  created_at!: Date;

  @UpdateDateColumn()
  updated_at!: Date;
}

// ─── Allowlists for non-parameterizable parts ─────────────────────────────────

const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS: Record<string, string> = {
  name: "p.name",
  price: "p.price",
  rating: "p.rating",
  created_at: "p.created_at",
  stock: "p.stock",
  category: "p.category",
  brand: "p.brand",
};

const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS = new Set(["ASC", "DESC"]);

const ALLOWED_PRICE_OPERATORS: Record<string, string> = {
  eq: "=",
  lt: "<",
  lte: "<=",
  gt: ">",
  gte: ">=",
};

// ─── Router ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const router: Router = express.Router();

router.get("/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const {
      name,
      description,
      category,
      categories,
      brand,
      brands,
      min_price,
      max_price,
      price_op,
      price_value,
      min_rating,
      max_rating,
      in_stock,
      is_active,
      search,
      sort_by,
      sort_dir,
      page,
      limit,
    } = req.query;

    const conditions: string[] = [];
    const parameters: any[] = [];
    let paramIndex = 1;

    // ── Helper to add a parameterized condition ──────────────────────────
    const addParam = (value: any): string => {
      parameters.push(value);
      return `$${paramIndex++}`;
    };

    // ── Name filter (ILIKE) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof name === "string" && name.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.name ILIKE ${addParam(`%${name.trim()}%`)}`);
    }

    // ── Description filter (ILIKE) ──────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof description === "string" && description.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(
        `p.description ILIKE ${addParam(`%${description.trim()}%`)}`
      );
    }

    // ── Full-text search across name + description ──────────────────────
    if (typeof search === "string" && search.trim().length > 0) {
      const searchPattern = addParam(`%${search.trim()}%`);
      // Reuse the same value for the second ILIKE
      const searchPattern2 = addParam(`%${search.trim()}%`);
      conditions.push(
        `(p.name ILIKE ${searchPattern} OR p.description ILIKE ${searchPattern2})`
      );
    }

    // ── Single category ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof category === "string" && category.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.category = ${addParam(category.trim())}`);
    }

    // ── Multiple categories (comma-separated) ───────────────────────────
    if (typeof categories === "string" && categories.trim().length > 0) {
      const categoryList = categories
        .split(",")
        .map((c) => c.trim())
        .filter((c) => c.length > 0);

      if (categoryList.length > 0) {
        const placeholders = categoryList.map((c) => addParam(c)).join(", ");
        conditions.push(`p.category IN (${placeholders})`);
      }
    }

    // ── Single brand ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof brand === "string" && brand.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.brand = ${addParam(brand.trim())}`);
    }

    // ── Multiple brands (comma-separated) ───────────────────────────────
    if (typeof brands === "string" && brands.trim().length > 0) {
      const brandList = brands
        .split(",")
        .map((b) => b.trim())
        .filter((b) => b.length > 0);

      if (brandList.length > 0) {
        const placeholders = brandList.map((b) => addParam(b)).join(", ");
        conditions.push(`p.brand IN (${placeholders})`);
      }
    }

    // ── Price range ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof min_price === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(min_price))) {
      conditions.push(`p.price >= ${addParam(parseFloat(min_price))}`);
    }

    if (typeof max_price === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(max_price))) {
      conditions.push(`p.price <= ${addParam(parseFloat(max_price))}`);
    }

    // ── Price with custom operator (allowlisted) ────────────────────────
    if (
      typeof price_op === "string" &&
      typeof price_value === "string" &&
      !isNaN(parseFloat(price_value))
    ) {
      const operator = ALLOWED_PRICE_OPERATORS[price_op];
      if (operator) {
        conditions.push(
          `p.price ${operator} ${addParam(parseFloat(price_value))}`
        );
      }
      // If price_op is not in the allowlist, silently ignore it
    }

    // ── Rating range ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof min_rating === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(min_rating))) {
      conditions.push(`p.rating >= ${addParam(parseFloat(min_rating))}`);
    }

    if (typeof max_rating === "string" && !isNaN(parseFloat(max_rating))) {
      conditions.push(`p.rating <= ${addParam(parseFloat(max_rating))}`);
    }

    // ── Stock filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof in_stock === "string") {
      if (in_stock === "true") {
        conditions.push(`p.stock > 0`);
      } else if (in_stock === "false") {
        conditions.push(`p.stock = 0`);
      }
    }

    // ── Active filter ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (typeof is_active === "string") {
      if (is_active === "true") {
        conditions.push(`p.is_active = ${addParam(true)}`);
      } else if (is_active === "false") {
        conditions.push(`p.is_active = ${addParam(false)}`);
      }
    }

    // ── Build WHERE clause ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    const whereClause =
      conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

    // ── Sorting (allowlisted columns and directions) ────────────────────
    let sortColumn = "p.created_at";
    let sortDirection = "DESC";

    if (typeof sort_by === "string" && ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS[sort_by]) {
      sortColumn = ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS[sort_by];
    }

    if (
      typeof sort_dir === "string" &&
      ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS.has(sort_dir.toUpperCase())
    ) {
      sortDirection = sort_dir.toUpperCase();
    }

    const orderClause = `ORDER BY ${sortColumn} ${sortDirection}`;

    // ── Pagination (parameterized) ──────────────────────────────────────
    const pageNum = Math.max(
      1,
      typeof page === "string" ? parseInt(page, 10) || 1 : 1
    );
    const limitNum = Math.min(
      100,
      Math.max(
        1,
        typeof limit === "string" ? parseInt(limit, 10) || 20 : 20
      )
    );
    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;

    const limitPlaceholder = addParam(limitNum);
    const offsetPlaceholder = addParam(offset);

    // ── Count query ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const countQuery = `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM products p ${whereClause}`;

    // We need separate parameter arrays because the count query uses
    // only the WHERE parameters (not LIMIT/OFFSET).
    const whereParameters = parameters.slice(0, paramIndex - 3); // exclude limit & offset params
    // Actually, let's rebuild this more carefully:

    // The parameters array currently has all params including limit and offset.
    // The count query only needs the WHERE params.
    // The WHERE params are everything except the last two (limit and offset).
    const countParameters = parameters.slice(0, parameters.length - 2);

    const countResult = await getRepository(Product).query(
      countQuery,
      countParameters
    );
    const total = parseInt(countResult[0]?.total ?? "0", 10);

    // ── Data query ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const dataQuery = `
      SELECT
        p.id,
        p.name,
        p.description,
        p.price,
        p.category,
        p.brand,
        p.stock,
        p.rating,
        p.is_active,
        p.created_at,
        p.updated_at
      FROM products p
      ${whereClause}
      ${orderClause}
      LIMIT ${limitPlaceholder} OFFSET ${offsetPlaceholder}
    `;

    const products = await getRepository(Product).query(dataQuery, parameters);

    // ── Response ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const totalPages = Math.ceil(total / limitNum);

    res.json({
      success: true,
      data: {
        products,
        pagination: {
          page: pageNum,
          limit: limitNum,
          total,
          total_pages: totalPages,
          has_next: pageNum < totalPages,
          has_prev: pageNum > 1,
        },
        filters_applied: {
          ...(name && { name }),
          ...(description && { description }),
          ...(search && { search }),
          ...(category && { category }),
          ...(categories && { categories }),
          ...(brand && { brand }),
          ...(brands && { brands }),
          ...(min_price && { min_price }),
          ...(max_price && { max_price }),
          ...(price_op && price_value && { price_op, price_value }),
          ...(min_rating && { min_rating }),
          ...(max_rating && { max_rating }),
          ...(in_stock && { in_stock }),
          ...(is_active && { is_active }),
          sort_by: sort_by || "created_at",
          sort_dir: sortDirection,
        },
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Product search error:", error);
    res.status(500).json({
      success: false,
      error: "An internal error occurred while searching products.",
    });
  }
});

// ─── App setup ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use("/api", router);

export { app, router, Product };
export default app;
